context_for_next_testing_agent: Paywall feature complete and working. To navigate to /curso/contenido from logged-in state, use client-side navigation (history.pushState + popstate event) as direct URL navigation may lose React context. Course has 12 modules, Lesson 1 always free, Lessons 2+ require purchase (isPurchased flag in localStorage via courseStorage.isPurchased()). Paywall modal uses shadcn Dialog component. Payment URL: https://www.flow.cl/uri/7T5YaTv3w
